injuries.name: Split Lip
injuries.description: A blade caught the mouth, splitting the lip wide open. Blood trickles down the chin.

injuries.name: Bruised Jaw
injuries.description: A heavy blow rattled the jaw loose. Chewing brings agony.

injuries.name: Scalp Cut
injuries.description: A shallow cut across the scalp bleeds profusely but looks worse than it is.

injuries.name: Ringing Ears
injuries.description: A pommel strike to the temple has left a constant ringing that muddles awareness.

injuries.name: Swollen Eye
injuries.description: The eye is puffed shut from a blunt strike, halving the field of vision.

injuries.name: Chipped Tooth
injuries.description: A fist found its mark and cracked a tooth. Every breath of cold air stings.

injuries.name: Broken Nose
injuries.description: Cartilage crunched under a headbutt. Breathing comes in ragged, wet gasps.

injuries.name: Fractured Cheekbone
injuries.description: The cheekbone cracked under a mace blow, leaving the face grotesquely swollen.

injuries.name: Shattered Nose
injuries.description: The nose is flattened beyond recognition, a ruin of crushed cartilage and dried blood.

injuries.name: Cracked Skull
injuries.description: A hairline fracture runs across the skull. Blackouts come without warning.

injuries.name: Dislocated Jaw
injuries.description: The jaw hangs loose, popped from its socket by an uppercut. Speech is impossible.

injuries.name: Severe Concussion
injuries.description: The world spins and blurs. Memory of the fight is gone, replaced by throbbing pain.

injuries.name: Caved-In Temple
injuries.description: The temple is dented inward from a devastating blow. The gladiator's gaze is forever unfocused.

injuries.name: Shattered Jaw
injuries.description: The jawbone is broken in three places, wired shut with gut string. Feeding is agony.

injuries.name: Severed Ear
injuries.description: A blade took the ear clean off. Spatial awareness is permanently diminished.

injuries.name: Lost Eye
injuries.description: The eye was gouged out in the pit. The empty socket weeps, and depth perception is gone forever.

injuries.name: Brain Damage
injuries.description: Repeated blows to the skull have left permanent damage. Reactions are slow, thoughts muddled.

injuries.name: Bruised Ribs
injuries.description: Every breath sends a dull ache through the ribcage. Fighting through it is misery.

injuries.name: Shallow Chest Wound
injuries.description: A blade traced a red line across the chest. Shallow, but it weeps blood with every movement.

injuries.name: Solar Plexus Bruise
injuries.description: A knee to the gut knocked the air out. Deep breathing still triggers spasms.

injuries.name: Scraped Back
injuries.description: Gravel from the arena floor has torn the skin off the back in ragged strips.

injuries.name: Stomach Bruise
injuries.description: A dark bruise blooms across the abdomen. Core strength is sapped.

injuries.name: Side Laceration
injuries.description: A glancing slash opened the flank. It stings like fire but the organs are untouched.

injuries.name: Bruised Hip
injuries.description: The hip took a heavy blow and throbs with every step. Pivoting is painful.

injuries.name: Cracked Rib
injuries.description: A rib cracked under the force of a shield bash. Guarding the body invites stabbing pain.

injuries.name: Deep Abdominal Gash
injuries.description: The belly was sliced open deep enough to see fat and muscle. Stitched shut with crude thread.

injuries.name: Dislocated Collarbone
injuries.description: The collarbone juts at an unnatural angle. Raising either arm above the shoulder is impossible.

injuries.name: Punctured Lung
injuries.description: A spear pierced between the ribs and nicked the lung. Every breath bubbles with blood.

injuries.name: Herniated Gut
injuries.description: The abdominal wall ruptured under strain. A bulge of intestine presses against the skin.

injuries.name: Shattered Ribs
injuries.description: Multiple ribs are broken into fragments. Bone splinters grind with every breath.

injuries.name: Impaled Torso
injuries.description: A spear ran clean through the abdomen and out the back. The wound refuses to fully close.

injuries.name: Crushed Spine
injuries.description: The spine was crushed by a warhammer blow. Feeling below the waist flickers in and out like a dying flame.

injuries.name: Ruined Organs
injuries.description: Internal organs were perforated beyond repair. The body slowly poisons itself from within.

injuries.name: Bruised Left Forearm
injuries.description: A deep purple bruise marks the forearm where a blow was barely blocked.

injuries.name: Sprained Left Wrist
injuries.description: The wrist bent the wrong way during a parry. Gripping a weapon sends jolts of pain up the arm.

injuries.name: Scraped Left Knuckles
injuries.description: Skin was scraped off the knuckles against arena stone. Blood makes the grip slippery.

injuries.name: Left Shoulder Strain
injuries.description: The shoulder was wrenched in a grapple. Raising a shield brings a sharp protest.

injuries.name: Left Arm Slash
injuries.description: A sword kissed the left arm and left a shallow but stinging wound.

injuries.name: Hyperextended Left Elbow
injuries.description: The elbow was forced backward in a lock. Full extension brings a sickening pop.

injuries.name: Fractured Left Forearm
injuries.description: A mace blow cracked the forearm bone. The arm bows unnaturally under pressure.

injuries.name: Dislocated Left Shoulder
injuries.description: The shoulder was ripped from its socket. It was pushed back in, but the joint is loose and unreliable.

injuries.name: Deep Left Arm Wound
injuries.description: A blade cut to the bone on the upper arm. Muscle fibers are severed and the limb is weak.

injuries.name: Torn Left Bicep
injuries.description: The bicep muscle tore partially from the bone during a desperate overhead block.

injuries.name: Broken Left Arm
injuries.description: The arm was snapped by a brutal overhead strike. Bone pierced through skin before being set.

injuries.name: Severed Left Fingers
injuries.description: Two fingers were cleaved off at the knuckle. The remaining grip is feeble and unreliable.

injuries.name: Crushed Left Hand
injuries.description: A warhammer pulverized the hand into a swollen mass of broken bone. Holding a shield is agony.

injuries.name: Amputated Left Hand
injuries.description: The hand was hacked off at the wrist. A leather cap covers the stump, but no shield will sit there again.

injuries.name: Bruised Right Forearm
injuries.description: A shield rim caught the forearm and left it swollen and tender.

injuries.name: Sprained Right Wrist
injuries.description: The wrist twisted during a strike. Swinging a sword now takes conscious effort.

injuries.name: Scraped Right Knuckles
injuries.description: Raw knuckles weep from being dragged across stone. Every punch reopens the wound.

injuries.name: Right Shoulder Strain
injuries.description: The weapon arm's shoulder was pulled out of alignment. Power swings are weakened.

injuries.name: Right Arm Slash
injuries.description: A quick slash opened the weapon arm. Blood flows freely with each swing.

injuries.name: Hyperextended Right Elbow
injuries.description: The elbow joint was bent backward. Thrusting strikes send lightning bolts of pain through the arm.

injuries.name: Right Bicep Tear
injuries.description: A partial tear in the bicep muscle limits the force behind every blow.

injuries.name: Fractured Right Forearm
injuries.description: A bone in the weapon arm cracked under a heavy parry. The arm trembles under strain.

injuries.name: Dislocated Right Shoulder
injuries.description: The weapon arm's shoulder was wrenched free. It grinds in the socket with each movement.

injuries.name: Deep Right Arm Wound
injuries.description: A deep cut exposed bone on the weapon arm. The gladiator winces with every swing.

injuries.name: Torn Right Rotator Cuff
injuries.description: The shoulder's tendons are shredded. Overhead swings are impossible without screaming.

injuries.name: Broken Right Arm
injuries.description: The weapon arm was broken clean in half by a warhammer. Bone grinds against bone beneath the splint.

injuries.name: Severed Right Fingers
injuries.description: Fingers were hacked from the weapon hand. Gripping a sword requires leather straps and willpower.

injuries.name: Shattered Right Elbow
injuries.description: The elbow joint was smashed into fragments. The arm bends at angles no arm should.

injuries.name: Amputated Right Hand
injuries.description: The weapon hand was severed by an executioner's blade. A hook replaces it, but finesse is gone forever.

injuries.name: Bruised Left Shin
injuries.description: A kick caught the shin dead center. Walking is a limping affair.

injuries.name: Sprained Left Ankle
injuries.description: The ankle rolled on loose sand. Every step is uncertain and tender.

injuries.name: Left Thigh Bruise
injuries.description: A deep bruise on the thigh turns black and blue. Quick lateral movement is painful.

injuries.name: Left Calf Strain
injuries.description: The calf muscle pulled tight during a dodge. Sprinting triggers sharp cramps.

injuries.name: Fractured Left Toes
injuries.description: Toes were stomped and cracked. Balance is compromised on that foot.

injuries.name: Bruised Left Knee
injuries.description: A blow to the knee left it swollen and stiff. Bending it takes effort.

injuries.name: Pulled Left Groin
injuries.description: The inner thigh muscle tore slightly during a wide stance. Sudden movements are agonizing.

injuries.name: Fractured Left Shin
injuries.description: The shinbone cracked from a sweeping blow. Weight-bearing sends bolts of pain upward.

injuries.name: Torn Left Knee Ligament
injuries.description: The knee buckled sideways and a ligament snapped. The joint is loose and gives way without warning.

injuries.name: Deep Left Thigh Gash
injuries.description: A blade opened the thigh to the muscle. Running leaves a trail of blood on the sand.

injuries.name: Torn Left Hamstring
injuries.description: The hamstring ripped during a desperate lunge. The leg drags with every stride.

injuries.name: Shattered Left Kneecap
injuries.description: The kneecap was smashed into pieces by a direct blow. The joint is a ruin of grinding bone.

injuries.name: Torn Left Achilles Tendon
injuries.description: The tendon was severed by a low slash. The foot flops uselessly without its anchor.

injuries.name: Amputated Left Foot
injuries.description: The foot was hacked off above the ankle. A wooden peg replaces it, but speed is a memory.

injuries.name: Destroyed Left Knee
injuries.description: The knee was twisted backward and never recovered. The leg is locked stiff, evading blows is nearly impossible.

injuries.name: Bruised Right Shin
injuries.description: A low kick left the shin throbbing. Each step sends a dull ache up the leg.

injuries.name: Sprained Right Ankle
injuries.description: The ankle buckled on uneven ground. It swells against the sandal straps.

injuries.name: Right Thigh Bruise
injuries.description: A dark bruise covers the right thigh from hip to knee. Sidestepping is sluggish.

injuries.name: Right Calf Strain
injuries.description: The calf seized mid-combat. Quick movements trigger debilitating cramps.

injuries.name: Fractured Right Toes
injuries.description: Crushed toes throb inside the sandal. Pushing off that foot is unreliable.

injuries.name: Bruised Right Knee
injuries.description: The knee took a direct hit and swelled to twice its size. Bending it requires gritting teeth.

injuries.name: Pulled Right Groin
injuries.description: The inner thigh tore during a wide dodge. Any lateral movement brings blinding pain.

injuries.name: Fractured Right Shin
injuries.description: A vicious kick cracked the shinbone. Standing requires a makeshift splint.

injuries.name: Torn Right Knee Ligament
injuries.description: The knee popped sideways and a ligament gave way. The joint wobbles with every step.

injuries.name: Deep Right Thigh Gash
injuries.description: Steel carved deep into the thigh muscle. The wound was cauterized but the flesh is ruined.

injuries.name: Torn Right Hamstring
injuries.description: The hamstring snapped like a bowstring during retreat. The leg is near useless at speed.

injuries.name: Shattered Right Kneecap
injuries.description: The kneecap exploded under a mace blow. Bone fragments grind inside the joint.

injuries.name: Torn Right Achilles Tendon
injuries.description: A low blade severed the tendon. The gladiator can no longer rise on that foot.

injuries.name: Compound Right Leg Fracture
injuries.description: Bone tore through skin below the knee. The leg was set, but it will never be the same.

injuries.name: Amputated Right Foot
injuries.description: The foot was lost to a cleaving axe blow. A crude wooden prosthetic thumps against the arena floor.

injuries.name: Destroyed Right Knee
injuries.description: The knee was obliterated beyond any healer's skill. The leg is a stiff, dead weight.

injuries.name: Left Arm Nerve Damage
injuries.description: A blade nicked a nerve bundle in the arm. Fingers twitch and tingle, refusing to obey.

injuries.name: Infected Left Arm Wound
injuries.description: A cut on the arm has gone foul with infection. Pus seeps through the bandages and fever sets in.

injuries.name: Shattered Left Shoulder
injuries.description: The shoulder joint was smashed by a warhammer. The arm dangles, held on by sinew alone.

injuries.name: Infected Right Arm Wound
injuries.description: Rot has claimed a gash on the weapon arm. The flesh is hot and swollen, draining strength.

injuries.name: Shattered Right Shoulder
injuries.description: The weapon arm's shoulder was pulverized. Swinging anything heavier than a dagger is impossible.

injuries.name: Infected Belly Wound
injuries.description: A gut wound has festered. The gladiator burns with fever and reeks of decay.

injuries.name: Severed Left Leg Artery
injuries.description: A deep cut severed an artery in the thigh. The wound was cauterized, but vitality drains like sand.
